issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Wandesk
products.tagline: Build Your Own AI Desktop
products.summaryZh: 构建你自己的AI桌面
products.descriptionZh: Wandesk 是一款 AI 桌面。只需描述需求，即可构建你需要的应用。可接入 Claude Code、Codex、DeepSeek、OpenAI、Kimi、Qwen 等任何兼容 OpenAI 的模型。应用之间共享上下文。AI 会记住你。所有数据本地处理。无需注册。
products.description: Wandesk is an AI desktop. Build the apps you need just by describing them. Plug in Claude Code, Codex, DeepSeek, OpenAI, Kimi, Qwen — anything OpenAI-compatible. Apps share context. AI remembers you. All local. No signup.

products.name: Wingbits AI
products.tagline: AI agents for real-time aircraft monitoring and alerts
products.summaryZh: 用于实时飞机监控与告警的AI智能体
products.descriptionZh: 创建全天候监控空域活动的智能体——无论是区域内的军用飞机、私人或政府公务机、GPS干扰激增，还是正在出行的亲友——一旦有相关动态，立即收到警报。或者直接询问当前空中的任何飞行物。由我们自建的独立网络驱动，覆盖120个国家，5600余个天线。无需编码，无需数据工程，无需存储TB级数据。
products.description: Create agents that monitor airspace activity 24/7 - military aircraft in a region, private or government jets, a GPS-jamming spike, or a travelling friend or family member - and get alerts the moment something relevant happens. Or just ask anything about what's flying right now. Powered by our own independent network of 5,600+ antennas across 120 countries. No code, no data engineering, no terabytes to store.

products.name: Exstats
products.tagline: Track your browser extensions and competitors in one place
products.summaryZh: 在一个地方追踪你的浏览器扩展和竞争对手。
products.descriptionZh: Exstats 统一了 Chrome、Edge 和 Firefox 上的浏览器扩展分析及市场调研。在一个平台上追踪你的产品、竞争对手、评论、排名、关键词和商店趋势，支持每日更新、历史记录、导出和提醒。
products.description: Exstats unifies browser extension analytics and market research across Chrome, Edge, and Firefox. Track your products, competitors, reviews, rankings, keywords, and store trends in one place, with daily updates, history, exports, and alerts.

products.name: Openstatus MCP Health Checker
products.tagline: Test MCP servers like a real AI client, not just a ping
products.summaryZh: 像真实AI客户端一样测试MCP服务器，而不仅仅是ping
products.descriptionZh: 大多数监控工具仅发送HTTP ping。但若JSON-RPC握手失败，200 OK响应毫无意义。我们的工具不同之处在于执行真正的协议级检查，行为完全等同于真实AI客户端。核心功能：完整握手：执行规范定义的initialize、ping和tools/list序列。深度可见性：检查精确的JSON-RPC载荷与协商版本。智能认证：在收到401响应时解析RFC 9728标头，明确显示令牌要求。
products.description: Most monitors just send an HTTP ping. But a 200 OK is useless if the JSON-RPC handshake fails. Our tool is different because it performs a true protocol-level check, acting exactly like a real AI client. Key features: Full Handshake: Executes the spec-defined initialize, ping, and tools/list sequence. Deep Visibility: Inspect exact JSON-RPC payloads and negotiated versions. Smart Auth: Parses RFC 9728 headers on 401s to surface exact token requirements.

products.name: Step 3.7 Flash
products.tagline: Flash-speed agents model that can see and act
products.summaryZh: Flash-speed agents 视觉与行动模型
products.descriptionZh: Apache 2.0开源权重Flash模型，专为实际场景中的智能体设计。Step 3.7 Flash集成了视觉、编码、搜索、工具使用、256K上下文、约110亿活跃参数，以及高达400 TPS的处理能力。
products.description: An Apache 2.0 open-weight Flash model for real-world agents. Step 3.7 Flash combines vision, coding, search, tool use, 256K context, ~11B active params, and up to 400 TPS.

products.name: Sleek Analytics
products.tagline: Privacy-first Google Analytics alternative for modern web
products.summaryZh: 面向现代网站的隐私优先型Google Analytics替代方案
products.descriptionZh: Sleek Analytics 是一款面向现代网络的隐私优先型 Google Analytics 替代方案。提供实时网站分析、无 Cookie 追踪及快速仪表盘功能。
products.description: Sleek Analytics is a privacy-first Google Analytics alternative for the modern web. Real-time website analytics, cookieless tracking, and fast dashboards.

products.name: InkieAI
products.tagline: AI SEO Agent on Autopilot
products.summaryZh: AI SEO 自动代理
products.descriptionZh: 全球首个博客SEO AI智能体。InkieAI是一款一站式SEO AI智能体，通过自动化关键词研究、SEO文章撰写和内容发布，为您节省时间和精力。
products.description: World's 1st AI agent for blog SEO. InkieAI is an all-in-one SEO AI agent that saves you time and effort with automated keyword research, SEO articles, and content publishing.

products.name: Veenew
products.tagline: A naked microblogging built on open standards
products.summaryZh: 基于开放标准的极简微博
products.descriptionZh: 一个简洁的微博客平台，但足够灵活，可适用于常规博客、随笔、日记、个人网站及介于其间的各种形式。它根植于开放标准和个人网站精神，支持ActivityPub协议，并为每个用户主页提供RSS订阅。无广告、无点赞、无评论、无AI、无算法。只是一个简单、清爽的空间，供你书写、分享想法并建立联结。
products.description: A simple microblogging platform at its core, but flexible enough for regular blogs, essays, journals, personal website, and everything in between. it is rooted in open standards and the personal-website ethos. Supports ActivityPub and provides RSS on every profile. No ads. No likes. No comments. No AI. No algorithms. Just a simple, uncluttered space to write and share your thoughts and get connected.

products.name: Niyam AI
products.tagline: Build Discipline - Get Direction - Attain Consistency.
products.summaryZh: 建立纪律 - 明确方向 - 达成一致。
products.descriptionZh: Niyam AI 是一款基于 Slack 的时间追踪工具，帮助团队无摩擦地制定和遵循日程安排。人们往往无法准确记录时间，要么忘记，要么在一天结束时批量补录，或者不得不切换到其他工具（如计时器、电子表格、项目管理软件）。Niyam AI 直接嵌入 Slack 中，你只需像平常一样发消息描述当前工作，它便会自动提取任务内容和耗时。无需填写表单、启动计时器或切换上下文。
products.description: Niyam AI is a Slack-based time tracking tool that helps teams build and follow schedules without any friction. People don’t log time accurately. They either forget, batch hours at end of day, or have to switch into a separate tool (timers, spreadsheets, project software). Niyam AI lives inside Slack. You message it like you normally would — describe what you’re working on — and it automatically extracts the task and time spent. No forms, no timers, no context switching.

products.name: Outbound Rewriter that gets replies
products.tagline: Paste your pitch, get 5 scored variants + follow-up cadence
products.summaryZh: 粘贴你的推销文案，获取5个评分版本及后续跟进节奏
products.descriptionZh: KnowledgeNet.ai 的 Outbound Rewriter 能在数秒内将通用冷启动信息转化为个性化、人性化的消息。粘贴草稿或 LinkedIn 个人资料后，AI 会研究潜在客户、识别购买信号，并运用经过验证的心理框架重写信息。该工具包含潜在客户情报、回复感知消息、反垃圾语言检查、合规评分、语气匹配及辅导洞察，帮助销售团队和创始人提升回复率。
products.description: Outbound Rewriter by KnowledgeNet.ai transforms generic cold outreach into personalized, human-quality messages in seconds. Paste a draft or LinkedIn profile, and AI researches the prospect, identifies buying signals, and rewrites your message using proven psychological frameworks. Includes prospect intelligence, reply-aware messaging, anti-spam language checks, compliance scoring, voice matching, and coaching insights to help sales teams and founders increase response rates

products.name: SnapZoom -  AI Auto-Zoom on Click
products.tagline: AI auto-zoom screen recorder for Chrome. No editing.
products.summaryZh: AI自动缩放屏幕录制工具（Chrome扩展）。无需剪辑。
products.descriptionZh: 免费Chrome录屏工具，每次点击自动实现AI电影级缩放。导出速度提升12倍，专业摄像头叠加，本地隐私保护。产品演示与教程场景下，Loom与Screencastify的最佳替代方案。
products.description: Free Chrome screen recorder with AI cinematic auto-zoom on every click. 12x faster exports, pro webcam overlays, local privacy. Best Loom & Screencastify alternative for product demos & tutorials.

products.name: Dayli
products.tagline: Lock your apps until you earn the time.
products.summaryZh: 锁定你的应用，直到你赢得使用时间。
products.descriptionZh:
大多数应用锁屏工具只是限制手机使用。Dayli 则不同——你通过完成真实目标（运动、阅读、学习、烹饪）来赚取屏幕使用时间。AI 通过照片验证你的努力，随后将赚取的分钟数存入你的时间银行。用这些时间解锁 Instagram、YouTube、TikTok。  
🔒 目标完成前应用保持锁定  
⚡ AI 即时验证你的努力  
⏱ 赚取的时间解锁应用  
📊 在 Vault 中追踪每周进度  
iOS 与 Android 免费使用。体验演示：dayli.live/demo
products.description: Most app blockers just restrict your phone. Dayli works differently. You earn screen time by completing real goals — exercise, reading, studying, cooking. AI verifies your effort with a photo, then adds earned minutes to your Time Bank. Use that time to unlock Instagram, YouTube, TikTok. 🔒 Apps locked until goals are done ⚡ AI verifies your effort instantly ⏱ Earned time unlocks your apps 📊 Track weekly progress in your Vault Free on iOS & Android. Try the demo: dayli.live/demo

products.name: LLMTrace
products.tagline: Know which commit blew up your LLM bill
products.summaryZh: 了解是哪个提交让你的LLM账单暴涨
products.descriptionZh: 每个LLM可观测性工具都会告诉你成本飙升了，但没人能告诉你哪个部署导致了这一情况。LLMTrace是一个自托管的Go代理，位于你的Anthropic/OpenAI调用之前，将每次请求的成本、用户和部署SHA记录到你自己的Postgres中。当账单突然增加时，你可以直接定位到具体的提交。无需SaaS，数据不会离开你的基础设施。只需放入docker-compose，5分钟内即可开始记录日志。
products.description: Every LLM observability tool shows you that costs spiked. None of them tell you which deploy caused it. LLMTrace is a self-hosted Go proxy that sits in front of your Anthropic/OpenAI calls and logs every request with cost, user, and deploy SHA into your own Postgres. When your bill jumps, you can point to the exact commit. No SaaS, no data leaving your infra. Drop in the docker-compose and you're logging in under 5 minutes.

products.name: swain.
products.tagline: your open source local AI security lead. one command.
products.summaryZh: 你的开源本地AI安全领导者。一条命令。
products.descriptionZh: 机器现在负责编写代码。斯温监控着它们写下的每一行。在发布前执行一条命令，即可利用你已有的Claude和Codex CLI进行本地AI安全审查。无需新账户、无需SaaS、无需仪表盘。它能捕捉认证漏洞、计费绕过、硬编码密钥、SQL注入和XSS攻击。最终只输出两样东西：阻碍你上线的具体问题，以及修复它的确切命令。机器写下的任何内容都无法逃过审查。
products.description: the machines write the code now. swain watches what they write. one command before you ship, local AI security review using the claude and codex CLIs you already have. no new accounts. no SaaS. no dashboard. catches auth bugs, billing bypasses, hardcoded secrets, SQL injection, XSS. ends with one thing: the exact issue blocking your launch and the exact command to fix it. nothing the machine writes passes unseen.

products.name: Demoflow
products.tagline: AI that creates product demos for your SAAS
products.summaryZh: 为您的SaaS产品生成演示的AI
products.descriptionZh: 停止花费数小时编辑屏幕录制。将你的网址和文本提示输入DemoFlow。我们的AI会启动浏览器、执行操作，并自动应用平滑光标追踪、运动模糊和电影级缩放，生成高清视频。
products.description: Stop wasting hours editing screen recordings. Drop your URL and a text prompt into DemoFlow. Our AI spins up a browser, executes the actions, and automatically applies smooth cursor tracking, motion blur, and cinematic zooms to generate a high-res video.

products.name: TagJournal
products.tagline: Track everything, in one app
products.summaryZh: 一个应用，追踪一切
products.descriptionZh: TagJournal是一款快速灵活的基于标签的日记应用（支持网页版和iOS），旨在以最少的投入和最大的洞察力帮助你记录日常生活。你只需添加标签，就能描述自己做了什么、感受如何、花了多少时间，甚至花了多少钱。每个“富标签”都可以携带额外数据，如时长、数值、日期或备注，从而形成一个既强大又轻量的日常记录系统。
products.description: TagJournal is a fast and flexible tagging-based journal (web and iOS) designed to help you track your daily life with minimal effort and maximum insight. TagJournal lets you simply add tags to describe what you did, how you felt, how much time you spent, or even how much you spent. Each "rich tag" can carry additional data like duration, value, date, or notes, making it a powerful yet lightweight system for capturing your day.

products.name: 99xDev
products.tagline: Build Fullstack Web Apps using AI
products.summaryZh: 使用AI构建全栈Web应用
products.descriptionZh: 99xDev是一款AI应用构建工具，用于开发全栈应用，内置数据库和存储功能，支持自定义域名，并提供可下载自托管的代码。
products.description: 99xDev is an AI app builder for full-stack apps with built-in database and storage, custom domains, and code you can download to self-host.

products.name: SnapHire
products.tagline: Show what a CV can't. ⭐
products.summaryZh: 展示简历无法呈现的内容。⭐
products.descriptionZh: SnapHire是一个以视频为核心的职业网络，用户可通过内容、作品集和公开档案展示技能、项目与经验。专业人士无需仅依赖传统简历，而是通过实际创作与分享的内容建立声誉、拓展人脉，并由此获得机会。
products.description: SnapHire is a video-first career network where people showcase skills, projects, and experience through content, portfolios, and public profiles. Instead of relying solely on traditional CVs, professionals can build reputation, grow their network, and get discovered through what they actually create and share.

products.name: Sunny Days Ahead
products.tagline: Find the sunniest places around the world
products.summaryZh: 探索全球阳光最充沛的地方
products.descriptionZh: Sunny Days Ahead 借助超过100年的历史天气数据，逐月为你发现日照最充足的旅行目的地，让你更有信心规划更明媚的旅程。
products.description: Sunny Days Ahead helps you discover the sunniest destinations month by month using 100+ years of historical weather data, so you can plan brighter trips with confidence.

products.name: Authentic Loops
products.tagline: Rate any company's interview process
products.summaryZh: 评价任何公司的面试流程
products.descriptionZh: Authentic Loops让面试过程变得透明。求职者描述面试的每个阶段，并为每个阶段打分，同时给出面试体验的整体评分。让公司对更好的面试流程负责，聚焦那些做得好的公司。
products.description: Authentic Loops is where interviewing becomes transparent. Candidates describe each stage of the interview process with a rating for each stage and overall rating for the interview experience. Hold companies accountable to better interviewing. Spotlight the ones doing it right.
